hero.name: Victor Rodrigues
hero.role: Junior Full-Stack Developer | Computer Engineering Student
hero.description: I build modern web applications and SaaS platforms using Next.js, TypeScript and PostgreSQL.
hero.currentProject: I'm currently building FlowJersey, a multi-tenant SaaS platform focused on sports e-commerce, with a strong emphasis on security, scalability and performance.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Professional dedicated to modern and scalable software development.

whoAmI.title: Who I am
whoAmI.description: I'm Victor Rodrigues, a Full-Stack Developer focused on building modern, secure and scalable web applications. I apply software development best practices, software architecture and user experience in every project I work on, turning technical knowledge into real-world solutions.

studies.title: What I study
studies.description: I'm currently deepening my knowledge in Full-Stack development, software architecture, application security and SaaS platforms. I combine technical training, continuous learning and hands-on project development to keep growing as a professional.

mainTech.title: Main technologies
mainTech.description: I primarily work with Next.js, React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL and Supabase, building modern applications focused on performance, security and scalability. I complement these skills with knowledge of APIs, authentication, databases and cloud infrastructure.

goals.title: Professional goals
goals.description: Continue evolving as a Full-Stack Developer through practical experience, real projects and ongoing training. Among my future goals are enrolling in a Computer Engineering degree and deepening my knowledge in Cybersecurity and Artificial Intelligence, contributing to the development of innovative and secure technology solutions.

featuredProject.title: Featured Project
featuredProject.name: FlowJersey
featuredProject.subtitle: Multi-Tenant SaaS Platform
featuredProject.problem: Sports jersey retailers need a simple and secure way to create online stores without investing in complex technical infrastructure.
featuredProject.solution: FlowJersey is a multi-tenant SaaS platform that lets each merchant create their online store on shared infrastructure, with product, order, customer and plan management in a single dashboard.
featuredProject.audience: Entrepreneurs and sports retailers who want to sell online professionally and at scale.
featuredProject.why: Built to apply SaaS architecture, multi-tenancy, RLS security and real payment integrations in practice.

galleryPlaceholder.title: Gallery coming soon
galleryPlaceholder.description: FlowJersey is under active development. A gallery with interface screenshots — dashboard, management area and public pages — will be published once the platform reaches a stable visual stage suitable for demonstration.

cv.title: Resume
cv.heroTagline: Specialized in modern web applications, SaaS platforms and scalable architecture.
summary: Full-Stack Developer focused on building modern web applications, SaaS platforms and scalable systems.
Currently developing FlowJersey, a multi-tenant SaaS platform built with Next.js, TypeScript and PostgreSQL.
I have a strong interest in software architecture, application security and scalable systems.
cv.objectiveHighlight: Continue growing as a Full-Stack Developer through building real products and deepening knowledge in Software Architecture, Cybersecurity and Artificial Intelligence.

mainProject.name: FlowJersey
description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform built for creating and managing online stores.
Includes secure authentication, per-tenant data isolation, admin dashboards, subscription system, Stripe integration and advanced management features.
Designed with a focus on scalability, security and user experience.
